mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals tight labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals stronger real economic activity, which increases corporate earnings visibility and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for INDPRO falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day returns show no correlation with INDPRO trends.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts indicates robust demand conditions that elevate equity risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns show no significant correlation with combined GDPC1/HOUST trends, or individual series exhibit negative ICs.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles marked by rising federal funds rates compress equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where FEDFUNDS rises > 0.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k jobs signals improving labor market dynamics that support corporate revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC for PAYEMS falls below 0.03 over any 1-year rolling window, or 5-day returns show no correlation with PAYEMS trends.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending as measured by real sales (RSAFS) indicates stronger demand conditions that elevate equity earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX returns show no significant correlation with RSAFS trends, or RSAFS exhibits negative ICs over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent disinflationary pressures indicated by falling CPI below 240 reduce central bank intervention risks, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL falls below 240.
